evals.name: new-file-detection
evals.prompt: Detect which new source files have been added to the project that require architecture documentation updates
expectations: Should detect all newly added source files
Should identify files lacking architecture documentation
Should identify which architecture layer the new files belong to

evals.name: incremental-update
evals.prompt: Update the existing src/auth/auth.arch.md to include the newly added OAuthProvider component without regenerating the entire document
expectations: Should add OAuthProvider section without rewriting existing content
Should preserve existing AuthService, JwtProvider, UserRepository sections
Should indicate this is an incremental update, not a full regeneration
Should update any table of contents or component list
